description:
Modify the photovoltaic properties of the existing solar array to simulate a 29% efficiency perovskite-silicon tandem cell, run an annual yield analysis, and report the results. 

Starting from the loaded `solar-rack-array.ng3`:
1. Select the solar array and update its technical specifications (apply to all panels):
   - Cell Efficiency: 29% (or 0.29 depending on UI)
   - Temperature Coefficient of Pmax: -0.20 %/°C
   - Nominal Operating Cell Temp (NOCT): 40 °C
2. Run the Annual Yield / Solar Radiation analysis for the array.
3. Save a screenshot of the resulting analysis graph/dialog as `~/Documents/Energy3D/yield_graph.png`.
4. Save the modified project as a new file at `~/Documents/Energy3D/high_efficiency_array.ng3`.
5. Create a text file at `~/Documents/Energy3D/yield_report.txt` containing the total calculated annual yield in kWh.
